incident.message: Hardcoded string "博客标题", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "发布日期: 2025-03-25", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "标签: 示例, 测试", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "博客内容...", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "文件路径: /path/to/blog.md", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "标题:", should use `@string` resource
Missing `autofillHints` attribute

Hardcoded string "标签 (用逗号分隔):", should use `@string` resource
Missing `autofillHints` attribute

Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)

`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
If you plan to use data binding in a Kotlin project, you should apply the kotlin-kapt plugin.
